## Summary

<!-- What does this PR change and why? -->

## Type of Change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Breaking change (requires major version bump)
- [ ] Refactor (no behavior change)
- [ ] Test improvements
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] CI / tooling

## Checklist

- [ ] `pnpm build` passes
- [ ] `pnpm type-check` passes
- [ ] `pnpm test` passes (all green)
- [ ] `pnpm lint` passes
- [ ] New or changed behavior has tests
- [ ] Public API changes are reflected in JSDoc
- [ ] A changeset has been added (`pnpm changeset`) for any user-facing change
- [ ] Breaking changes are documented in the changeset body
- [ ] No `any` types introduced
